center.name: 半岛
center.summary: 半岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括灰腰凤头雨燕，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species is commonly found in peninsular Malaysia, but has an extremely large range; there is limited information about population trends.Jeyarajasingam
